title: Monster Beverage: Global Sales Are Climbing Quickly
text: Sales from outside the US and Canada were just 25.7% of the total in 2018 and this has climbed up to 35.2% of the total for 9M22. Growth has been especially fast in Latin America and the Caribbean.
